SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.extension.impl

Class KeYGuiExtensionFacade

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.extension.impl.KeYGuiExtensionFacade
public final class KeYGuiExtensionFacade extends Object
Facade for retrieving the GUI extensions.

      mainWindow - non-null
      Returns:

    • getContextMenuExtensions

      public static List<KeYGuiExtension.ContextMenu> getContextMenuExtensions()
      Retrieves all known implementation of the KeYGuiExtension.MainMenu
      Returns:
      a list

    • createContextMenu

      public static JPopupMenu createContextMenu(ContextMenuKind kind, Object underlyingObject, KeYMediator mediator)
      Create a context menu with extension-provided actions for the specified kind and underlying object.

      If the underlying object is a proof, this will also include the usual actions.

      Parameters:
      kind - what kind of object the context menu is built on
      underlyingObject - the object the context menu is built on
      mediator - the KeY mediator
      Returns:
      populated context menu

    • addContextMenuItems

      public static void addContextMenuItems(ContextMenuKind kind, JPopupMenu menu, Object underlyingObject, KeYMediator mediator)

      public static List<Action> getContextMenuItems(ContextMenuKind kind, Object underlyingObject, KeYMediator mediator)

    • getTooltipExtensions

      public static List<KeYGuiExtension.Tooltip> getTooltipExtensions()
      Retrieves all known implementations of the KeYGuiExtension.Tooltip.
      Returns:
      all known implementations of the KeYGuiExtension.Tooltip.

    • getTooltipStrings

      public static List<String> getTooltipStrings(MainWindow window, PosInSequent pos)
      Parameters:
      window - the main window.
      pos - the position the user selected.
      Returns:
      every term info string from every loaded extension.

    • getTermInfoStrings

      public static Stream<String> getTermInfoStrings(MainWindow mainWindow, PosInSequent mousePos)

    • forbidClass

      public void forbidClass(String clazz)
      Disables the clazz from further loading.

      If this extension is already loaded, it will be removed from the list of extensions. This does not include a removal from the GUI in all cases.

      Parameters:
      clazz - a fqdn of a class

    • allowClass

      public void allowClass(String clazz)
      removes a class from the forbidden list.

      Without a plugin lifecycle this is very useless.

      Parameters:
      clazz -
